name: Gmail campaign sender: bulk personalized emails from Sheets
description: Reads recipient data from Google Sheets, uses Claude AI to personalize each email based on recipient details, then sends individualized emails via Gmail in a loop. Tracks send status back to Sheets.

source.originalName: Gmail campaign sender: Bulk-send emails and follow up automatically if no reply

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading recipients

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for campaign status notifications

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for campaign notifications

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL containing recipients (columns: Name, Email, Company, Role, Notes)

sheetName.description: Name of the sheet tab with recipient data

campaignSubject.description: Email subject line template (use {name} and {company} as placeholders)

campaignContext.description: Brief description of what the campaign is about (e.g. 'We offer AI automation services for mid-market SaaS companies')

senderName.description: Name to use in email signature

steps.name: Prepare recipient list from Sheets URL
Build Claude prompt to personalize all emails at once
Run Claude AI to personalize emails
Send personalized emails via Gmail loop
